<!-- Code generated by terraform-docs. DO NOT EDIT. -->
# API Management Service

This module deploys one or more Azure API Management services using the [AVM API Management Service module](https://registry.terraform.io/modules/Azure/avm-res-apimanagement-service/azurerm/0.9.0) (`v0.9.0`).

## Key-Based References

| Field | Resolves Via | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `resource_group_key` | `var.resource_groups` | Resource group name |
| `virtual_network_vnet_key` / `virtual_network_subnet_key` | `var.virtual_networks` | VNet injection subnet resource ID |
| `public_ip_address_key` | `var.public_ips` | Public IP resource ID |
| `additional_location.public_ip_address_key` / `vnet_key` / `subnet_key` | `var.public_ips` / `var.virtual_networks` | Per-region public IP and subnet resource IDs |
| `managed_identities.user_assigned_keys` | `var.managed_identities` | User-assigned managed identity resource IDs |
| `private_endpoints.vnet_key` / `subnet_key` | `var.virtual_networks` | Private endpoint subnet resource ID |
| `diagnostic_settings.workspace_key` | `var.log_analytics_workspaces` | Diagnostic destination workspace resource ID |
| `role_assignments.managed_identity_key` | `var.managed_identities` | Principal ID for role assignments |

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.13, < 2.0)

- <a name="requirement_azurerm"></a> [azurerm](#requirement\_azurerm) (~> 4.0)

## Resources

The following resources are used by this module:

- [azurerm_client_config.current](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/data-sources/client_config) (data source)

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_location"></a> [location](#input\_location)

Description: Default location fallback when an API Management service does not set location.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_api_management_services"></a> [api\_management\_services](#input\_api\_management\_services)

Description: A map of Azure API Management services to create by wrapping the `Azure/avm-res-apimanagement-service/azurerm` AVM module (v0.9.0).  
The map key is deliberately arbitrary to avoid issues where map keys may be unknown at plan time.

Standard fields:
- `name` - (Required) The name of the API Management service. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `resource_group_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a resource group in the `resource_groups` variable. Resolved to the resource group name. At least one of `resource_group_key` or `resource_group_name` must be provided.
- `resource_group_name` - (Optional) The name of the resource group to deploy into. Overrides `resource_group_key`. At least one of `resource_group_key` or `resource_group_name` must be provided.
- `location` - (Optional) The Azure Region where the service should exist. Defaults to `var.location`.
- `tags` - (Optional) A mapping of tags merged with `var.tags`. Defaults to `{}`.

Publisher / SKU:
- `publisher_email` - (Required) The email of the API Management service publisher.
- `publisher_name` - (Optional) The name of the API Management service publisher. Defaults to `"Apim Example Publisher"`.
- `sku_name` - (Optional) The SKU name (e.g. `Developer_1`, `Basic_1`, `Standard_1`, `Premium_3`, `Consumption_0`). Defaults to `"Developer_1"`.

Control-plane / networking:
- `min_api_version` - (Optional) The control-plane API calls are limited to versions equal to or newer than this value.
- `notification_sender_email` - (Optional) Email address from which notifications will be sent.
- `virtual_network_type` - (Optional) Virtual network configuration type. Possible values are `None`, `External`, `Internal`. Defaults to `"None"`.
- `virtual_network_subnet_id` - (Optional) The ID of the subnet to deploy the service into, used directly. Fallback when `virtual_network_vnet_key`/`virtual_network_subnet_key` are not provided.
- `virtual_network_vnet_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a virtual network in the `virtual_networks` variable.
- `virtual_network_subnet_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a subnet within the VNet identified by `virtual_network_vnet_key`. Resolved to the subnet resource ID and used when `virtual_network_subnet_id` is not set.
- `public_ip_address_id` - (Optional) ID of a standard SKU IPv4 Public IP, used directly. Only supported on Premium and Developer tiers when deployed in a virtual network. Fallback when `public_ip_address_key` is not provided.
- `public_ip_address_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a public IP in the `public_ips` variable (created by the `public_ip` module), resolved to its `resource_id`. Used when `public_ip_address_id` is not set.
- `public_network_access_enabled` - (Optional) Whether public access to the Management plane is allowed. Defaults to `true`.
- `gateway_disabled` - (Optional) Disable the gateway in the main region. Only supported when `additional_location` is set. Defaults to `false`.
- `client_certificate_enabled` - (Optional) Enforce a client certificate on each gateway request. Only supported on the Consumption SKU. Defaults to `false`.
- `zones` - (Optional) A list of Availability Zones. Only supported in the Premium tier.
- `private_endpoints_manage_dns_zone_group` - (Optional) Whether to manage private DNS zone groups with this module. Defaults to `true`.

- `managed_identities` - (Optional) Managed identity configuration. Defaults to `{}`.
  - `system_assigned` - (Optional) Whether to enable the system-assigned managed identity. Defaults to `false`.
  - `user_assigned_resource_ids` - (Optional) A set of user-assigned managed identity resource IDs assigned directly. Defaults to `[]`.
  - `user_assigned_keys` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: a set of keys from the `managed_identities` variable. Resolved to UAMI resource IDs and merged with `user_assigned_resource_ids`. Defaults to `[]`.

- `protocols` - (Optional) Protocol settings.
  - `enable_http2` - (Optional) Whether to enable HTTP/2. Defaults to `false`.

- `security` - (Optional) Backend/frontend TLS/SSL cipher settings. Defaults to `null` (no security block). Every flag defaults to `false` except `enable_backend_tls13`/`enable_frontend_tls13`, which are unset so the module leaves TLS 1.3 untouched.
  - `enable_backend_ssl30` - (Optional) Whether to enable SSL 3.0 on the backend. Defaults to `false`.
  - `enable_backend_tls10` - (Optional) Whether to enable TLS 1.0 on the backend. Defaults to `false`.
  - `enable_backend_tls11` - (Optional) Whether to enable TLS 1.1 on the backend. Defaults to `false`.
  - `enable_backend_tls13` - (Optional) Whether to enable TLS 1.3 on the backend. Unset by default; the module does not modify it (configured via Azure REST API custom properties).
  - `enable_frontend_ssl30` - (Optional) Whether to enable SSL 3.0 on the frontend. Defaults to `false`.
  - `enable_frontend_tls10` - (Optional) Whether to enable TLS 1.0 on the frontend. Defaults to `false`.
  - `enable_frontend_tls11` - (Optional) Whether to enable TLS 1.1 on the frontend. Defaults to `false`.
  - `enable_frontend_tls13` - (Optional) Whether to enable TLS 1.3 on the frontend. Unset by default; the module does not modify it (configured via Azure REST API custom properties).
  - `tls_ecdhe_ecdsa_with_aes128_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_ECDHE\_ECDSA\_WITH\_AES\_128\_CBC\_SHA cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tls_ecdhe_ecdsa_with_aes256_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_ECDHE\_ECDSA\_WITH\_AES\_256\_CBC\_SHA cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tls_ecdhe_rsa_with_aes128_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_ECDHE\_RSA\_WITH\_AES\_128\_CBC\_SHA cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tls_ecdhe_rsa_with_aes256_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_ECDHE\_RSA\_WITH\_AES\_256\_CBC\_SHA cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tls_rsa_with_aes128_cbc_sha256_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_RSA\_WITH\_AES\_128\_CBC\_SHA256 cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tls_rsa_with_aes128_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_RSA\_WITH\_AES\_128\_CBC\_SHA cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tls_rsa_with_aes128_gcm_sha256_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_RSA\_WITH\_AES\_128\_GCM\_SHA256 cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tls_rsa_with_aes256_gcm_sha384_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_RSA\_WITH\_AES\_256\_GCM\_SHA384 cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tls_rsa_with_aes256_cbc_sha256_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_RSA\_WITH\_AES\_256\_CBC\_SHA256 cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tls_rsa_with_aes256_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable the TLS\_RSA\_WITH\_AES\_256\_CBC\_SHA cipher. Defaults to `false`.
  - `triple_des_ciphers_enabled` - (Optional) Enable 3DES (Triple DES) ciphers. Defaults to `false`.

- `policy` - (Optional) Service-level (global) policy applied to all APIs. Defaults to `null`.
  - `xml_content` - (Required) The XML content of the policy.

Portal settings:
- `sign_in` - (Optional) Sign-in settings. Defaults to `null`.
  - `enabled` - (Required) When `true`, anonymous users are redirected to the sign-in page.
- `sign_up` - (Optional) Sign-up settings. Defaults to `null`.
  - `enabled` - (Required) Whether sign-up is enabled.
  - `terms_of_service` - (Required) Terms of service configuration.
    - `consent_required` - (Required) Whether the user must consent to the terms.
    - `enabled` - (Required) Whether the terms of service are enabled.
    - `text` - (Optional) The terms of service text. Defaults to `null`.
- `delegation` - (Optional) Delegation settings. Defaults to `null`.
  - `subscriptions_enabled` - (Optional) Whether subscription delegation is enabled. Defaults to `false`.
  - `user_registration_enabled` - (Optional) Whether user registration delegation is enabled. Defaults to `false`.
  - `url` - (Optional) The delegation endpoint URL. Defaults to `null`.
  - `validation_key` - (Optional) The delegation validation key. Defaults to `null`.
- `tenant_access` - (Optional) Controls whether access to the management API is enabled. Defaults to `null`.
  - `enabled` - (Required) Whether management API access is enabled.

- `lock` - (Optional) Resource lock configuration. Defaults to `null`.
  - `kind` - (Required) The lock type. Possible values are `CanNotDelete` and `ReadOnly`.
  - `name` - (Optional) The lock name. Generated from `kind` if not set. Defaults to `null`.

- `additional_location` - (Optional) A list of additional datacenter locations. Defaults to `[]`. Each object:
  - `location` - (Required) The Azure region for the additional location.
  - `capacity` - (Optional) The capacity (units) at this location. Defaults to `null`.
  - `zones` - (Optional) A list of Availability Zones for this location. Defaults to `null`.
  - `public_ip_address_id` - (Optional) Public IP resource ID for this location, used directly. Defaults to `null`.
  - `public_ip_address_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a public IP in the `public_ips` variable, resolved to its `resource_id`. Used when `public_ip_address_id` is not set.
  - `gateway_disabled` - (Optional) Whether the gateway is disabled at this location. Defaults to `null`.
  - `virtual_network_configuration` - (Optional) VNet configuration for this location. Defaults to `null`.
    - `subnet_id` - (Optional) The subnet resource ID, used directly. Fallback when `vnet_key`/`subnet_key` are not provided.
    - `vnet_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a virtual network in the `virtual_networks` variable.
    - `subnet_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a subnet within the VNet identified by `vnet_key`. Resolved to the subnet resource ID.

- `certificate` - (Optional) A list of certificate configurations. Defaults to `[]`. Each object:
  - `encoded_certificate` - (Required) The base64-encoded certificate (PFX/CER).
  - `store_name` - (Required) The certificate store name. Possible values are `CertificateAuthority` and `Root`.
  - `certificate_password` - (Optional) The certificate password. Defaults to `null`.

- `hostname_configuration` - (Optional) Custom hostname configuration. Defaults to `null`. Contains the lists `management`, `portal`, `developer_portal`, `proxy`, and `scm`.
  - `management` - (Optional) A list of management endpoint hostnames. Defaults to `[]`. Each entry:
    - `host_name` - (Required) The hostname.
    - `key_vault_id` - (Optional) The Key Vault secret ID of the certificate. Defaults to `null`.
    - `certificate` - (Optional) The base64-encoded certificate. Defaults to `null`.
    - `certificate_password` - (Optional) The certificate password. Defaults to `null`.
    - `negotiate_client_certificate` - (Optional) Whether to negotiate a client certificate. Defaults to `false`.
    - `ssl_keyvault_identity_client_id` - (Optional) Client ID of the UAMI used to access the Key Vault certificate. Defaults to `null`.
  - `portal` - (Optional) A list of legacy portal hostnames. Defaults to `[]`. Same fields as `management`.
  - `developer_portal` - (Optional) A list of developer portal hostnames. Defaults to `[]`. Same fields as `management`.
  - `proxy` - (Optional) A list of gateway (proxy) hostnames. Defaults to `[]`. Same fields as `management`, plus:
    - `default_ssl_binding` - (Optional) Whether this hostname is the default SSL binding. Defaults to `false`.
  - `scm` - (Optional) A list of SCM endpoint hostnames. Defaults to `[]`. Same fields as `management`.

- `role_assignments` - (Optional) A map of role assignments to create on the service. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
  - `role_definition_id_or_name` - (Required) The role definition ID or display name to assign.
  - `principal_id` - (Optional) The principal (object) ID to assign the role to. Mutually exclusive with `managed_identity_key` and `assign_to_caller`.
  - `managed_identity_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a managed identity in the `managed_identities` variable, resolved to its principal ID. Sets `principal_type` to `ServicePrincipal`. Mutually exclusive with `principal_id` and `assign_to_caller`.
  - `assign_to_caller` - (Optional) When `true`, uses the object ID of the identity running Terraform as the principal. Mutually exclusive with `principal_id` and `managed_identity_key`. Defaults to `false`.
  - `description` - (Optional) The role assignment description. Defaults to `null`.
  - `skip_service_principal_aad_check` - (Optional) Skip the Entra ID check for the service principal. Defaults to `false`.
  - `condition` - (Optional) The ABAC condition used to scope the assignment. Defaults to `null`.
  - `condition_version` - (Optional) The condition syntax version (e.g. `2.0`). Defaults to `null`.
  - `delegated_managed_identity_resource_id` - (Optional) Delegated managed identity resource ID (cross-tenant). Defaults to `null`.
  - `principal_type` - (Optional) The principal type. Possible values are `User`, `Group`, `ServicePrincipal`. Defaults to `null`.

- `diagnostic_settings` - (Optional) A map of diagnostic settings. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
  - `name` - (Optional) The diagnostic setting name. Generated if not set. Defaults to `null`.
  - `log_categories` - (Optional) A set of individual log categories to send. Defaults to `[]`.
  - `log_groups` - (Optional) A set of log category groups to send. Defaults to `["allLogs"]`.
  - `metric_categories` - (Optional) A set of metric categories to send. Defaults to `["AllMetrics"]`.
  - `log_analytics_destination_type` - (Optional) Destination type. Possible values are `Dedicated` and `AzureDiagnostics`. Defaults to `Dedicated`.
  - `workspace_resource_id` - (Optional) The Log Analytics workspace resource ID, used directly. Defaults to `null`.
  - `workspace_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a Log Analytics workspace in the `log_analytics_workspaces` variable, resolved to its resource ID. Used when `workspace_resource_id` is not set.
  - `use_default_log_analytics` - (Optional) When `true` (and neither `workspace_resource_id` nor `workspace_key` is set), uses the first workspace in `log_analytics_workspaces`. Defaults to `false`.
  - `storage_account_resource_id` - (Optional) Destination storage account resource ID. Defaults to `null`.
  - `event_hub_authorization_rule_resource_id` - (Optional) Destination event hub authorization rule resource ID. Defaults to `null`.
  - `event_hub_name` - (Optional) Destination event hub name. Defaults to `null`.
  - `marketplace_partner_resource_id` - (Optional) Destination Marketplace partner resource ID. Defaults to `null`.

- `private_endpoints` - (Optional) A map of private endpoints to create on the service. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
  - `name` - (Optional) The private endpoint name. Generated if not set. Defaults to `null`.
  - `role_assignments` - (Optional) A map of role assignments to create on the private endpoint. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
    - `role_definition_id_or_name` - (Required) The role definition ID or display name.
    - `principal_id` - (Required) The principal (object) ID to assign the role to.
    - `description` - (Optional) The role assignment description. Defaults to `null`.
    - `skip_service_principal_aad_check` - (Optional) Skip the Entra ID check for the service principal. Defaults to `false`.
    - `condition` - (Optional) The ABAC condition. Defaults to `null`.
    - `condition_version` - (Optional) The condition syntax version. Defaults to `null`.
    - `delegated_managed_identity_resource_id` - (Optional) Delegated managed identity resource ID. Defaults to `null`.
    - `principal_type` - (Optional) The principal type. Defaults to `null`.
  - `lock` - (Optional) Lock configuration for the private endpoint. Defaults to `null`.
    - `kind` - (Required) The lock type. Possible values are `CanNotDelete` and `ReadOnly`.
    - `name` - (Optional) The lock name. Defaults to `null`.
  - `tags` - (Optional) Tags for the private endpoint. Defaults to `null`.
  - `subnet_resource_id` - (Optional) The subnet resource ID, used directly. Fallback when `vnet_key`/`subnet_key` are not provided.
  - `vnet_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a virtual network in the `virtual_networks` variable.
  - `subnet_key` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: the key of a subnet within the VNet identified by `vnet_key`. Resolved to the subnet resource ID.
  - `private_dns_zone_group_name` - (Optional) The private DNS zone group name. Defaults to `default`.
  - `private_dns_zone` - (Optional) Private DNS zones for the endpoint. Defaults to `{}`.
    - `resource_ids` - (Optional) A set of private DNS zone resource IDs, used directly. Defaults to `[]`.
    - `keys` - (Optional) **Pattern cross-reference**: a set of keys from the `private_dns_zones` variable, each resolved to a zone resource ID and merged with `resource_ids`. Defaults to `[]`.
  - `private_dns_zone_resource_ids` - (Optional) A set of private DNS zone resource IDs passed straight through to the AVM module. Defaults to `[]`.
  - `application_security_group_associations` - (Optional) A map of application security group associations. Defaults to `{}`.
  - `private_service_connection_name` - (Optional) The private service connection name. Generated if not set. Defaults to `null`.
  - `network_interface_name` - (Optional) The network interface name. Generated if not set. Defaults to `null`.
  - `location` - (Optional) The location for the private endpoint. Defaults to the resource group location. Defaults to `null`.
  - `resource_group_name` - (Optional) The resource group for the private endpoint. Defaults to the service's resource group. Defaults to `null`.
  - `ip_configurations` - (Optional) A map of static IP configurations. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
    - `name` - (Required) The IP configuration name.
    - `private_ip_address` - (Required) The static private IP address.

- `subscriptions` - (Optional) A map of subscriptions. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
  - `display_name` - (Required) The subscription display name.
  - `scope_type` - (Required) The scope type. Possible values are `product`, `api`, `all_apis`.
  - `scope_identifier` - (Optional) The product ID or API name. Required for `product`/`api` scopes. Defaults to `null`.
  - `user_id` - (Optional) The owning user ID (format `/users/{userId}`). Defaults to `null`.
  - `primary_key` - (Optional) A custom primary subscription key. Defaults to `null`.
  - `secondary_key` - (Optional) A custom secondary subscription key. Defaults to `null`.
  - `state` - (Optional) The subscription state. Possible values are `active`, `suspended`, `submitted`, `rejected`, `cancelled`. Defaults to `active`.
  - `allow_tracing` - (Optional) Whether tracing is allowed. Defaults to `false`.

- `named_values` - (Optional) A map of named values. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
  - `display_name` - (Required) The named value display name (unique within the service).
  - `value` - (Optional) The value. Conflicts with `value_from_key_vault`. Defaults to `null`.
  - `secret` - (Optional) Whether the value is a secret. Defaults to `false`.
  - `tags` - (Optional) A list of tags used to filter named values. Defaults to `[]`.
  - `value_from_key_vault` - (Optional) A Key Vault secret source. Conflicts with `value`. Defaults to `null`.
    - `secret_id` - (Required) The versioned Key Vault secret ID.
    - `identity_client_id` - (Optional) Client ID of the UAMI used for Key Vault access. Uses the system-assigned identity if unset. Defaults to `null`.

- `products` - (Optional) A map of products. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
  - `display_name` - (Required) The product display name.
  - `description` - (Optional) The product description. Defaults to `null`.
  - `terms` - (Optional) The product terms of use. Defaults to `null`.
  - `subscription_required` - (Optional) Whether a subscription is required to access APIs in the product. Defaults to `false`.
  - `approval_required` - (Optional) Whether subscription approval is required. Defaults to `false`.
  - `subscriptions_limit` - (Optional) The maximum number of subscriptions. Defaults to `null`.
  - `state` - (Optional) The publication state. Possible values are `published`, `notPublished`. Defaults to `published`.
  - `api_names` - (Optional) A list of API names to associate with the product. Defaults to `[]`.
  - `group_names` - (Optional) A list of group names to associate with the product. Defaults to `[]`.

- `api_version_sets` - (Optional) A map of API version sets. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
  - `display_name` - (Required) The version set display name.
  - `versioning_scheme` - (Required) The versioning scheme. Possible values are `Header`, `Query`, `Segment`.
  - `description` - (Optional) The version set description. Defaults to `null`.
  - `version_header_name` - (Optional) The header name for the `Header` scheme. Defaults to `null`.
  - `version_query_name` - (Optional) The query parameter name for the `Query` scheme. Defaults to `null`.

- `backends` - (Optional) A map of backends. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
  - `protocol` - (Required) The backend protocol. Possible values are `http` or `soap`.
  - `url` - (Required) The backend host URL.
  - `description` - (Optional) The backend description. Defaults to `null`.
  - `resource_id` - (Optional) The ARM resource ID of the backend host. Defaults to `null`.
  - `title` - (Optional) The backend title. Defaults to `null`.
  - `credentials` - (Optional) Backend credentials. Defaults to `null`.
    - `authorization` - (Optional) Authorization header configuration. Defaults to `null`.
      - `parameter` - (Optional) The authentication parameter value. Defaults to `null`.
      - `scheme` - (Optional) The authentication scheme name. Defaults to `null`.
    - `certificate` - (Optional) A list of client certificate thumbprints. Defaults to `[]`.
    - `header` - (Optional) A map of header name to comma-separated header values. Defaults to `{}`.
    - `query` - (Optional) A map of query parameter name to comma-separated values. Defaults to `{}`.
  - `proxy` - (Optional) Proxy server configuration. Defaults to `null`.
    - `url` - (Required) The proxy server URL.
    - `username` - (Required) The proxy username.
    - `password` - (Optional) The proxy password. Defaults to `null`.
  - `service_fabric_cluster` - (Optional) Service Fabric cluster backend configuration. Defaults to `null`.
    - `client_certificate_thumbprint` - (Optional) Client certificate thumbprint for the management endpoint. Defaults to `null`.
    - `client_certificate_id` - (Optional) Client certificate resource ID for the management endpoint. Defaults to `null`.
    - `management_endpoints` - (Required) A list of cluster management endpoints.
    - `max_partition_resolution_retries` - (Required) The maximum partition resolution retries.
    - `server_certificate_thumbprints` - (Optional) A list of server certificate thumbprints. Defaults to `[]`.
    - `server_x509_name` - (Optional) A list of server X.509 certificate names. Defaults to `[]`. Each object:
      - `issuer_certificate_thumbprint` - (Required) The issuer certificate thumbprint.
      - `name` - (Required) The certificate common name.
  - `tls` - (Optional) TLS validation settings. Defaults to `null`.
    - `validate_certificate_chain` - (Optional) Whether to validate the SSL certificate chain. Defaults to `null`.
    - `validate_certificate_name` - (Optional) Whether to validate the SSL certificate name. Defaults to `null`.

- `apis` - (Optional) A map of APIs. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
  - `display_name` - (Required) The API display name.
  - `path` - (Required) The relative API path (unique within the service).
  - `protocols` - (Optional) A list of supported protocols. Possible values are `http`, `https`, `ws`, `wss`. Defaults to `["https"]`.
  - `revision` - (Optional) The API revision. Defaults to `"1"`.
  - `service_url` - (Optional) The backend service URL. Defaults to `null`.
  - `description` - (Optional) The API description. Defaults to `null`.
  - `subscription_required` - (Optional) Whether a subscription key is required. Defaults to `true`.
  - `api_version` - (Optional) The API version identifier. Defaults to `null`.
  - `api_version_set_name` - (Optional) The associated API version set name. Defaults to `null`.
  - `revision_description` - (Optional) The API revision description. Defaults to `null`.
  - `import` - (Optional) Import configuration (OpenAPI/WSDL/WADL). Defaults to `null`.
    - `content_format` - (Required) The content format (e.g. `openapi`, `openapi+json`, `swagger-json`, `wsdl`, `wadl-xml`, and their `-link` variants).
    - `content_value` - (Required) The API definition content or URL.
    - `wsdl_selector` - (Optional) WSDL selector for SOAP APIs. Defaults to `null`.
      - `service_name` - (Required) The WSDL service name.
      - `endpoint_name` - (Required) The WSDL endpoint (port) name.
  - `source_api_id` - (Optional) Source API ID to clone from. Defaults to `null`.
  - `oauth2_authorization` - (Optional) OAuth2 authorization configuration. Defaults to `null`.
    - `authorization_server_name` - (Required) The authorization server name.
    - `scope` - (Optional) The OAuth2 scope. Defaults to `null`.
  - `openid_authentication` - (Optional) OpenID Connect configuration. Defaults to `null`.
    - `openid_provider_name` - (Required) The OpenID provider name.
    - `bearer_token_sending_methods` - (Optional) A list of bearer token sending methods. Defaults to `null`.
  - `subscription_key_parameter_names` - (Optional) Custom subscription key parameter names. Defaults to `null`.
    - `header` - (Required) The header name carrying the subscription key.
    - `query` - (Required) The query parameter name carrying the subscription key.
  - `contact` - (Optional) API contact information. Defaults to `null`.
    - `email` - (Optional) The contact email. Defaults to `null`.
    - `name` - (Optional) The contact name. Defaults to `null`.
    - `url` - (Optional) The contact URL. Defaults to `null`.
  - `license` - (Optional) API license information. Defaults to `null`.
    - `name` - (Optional) The license name. Defaults to `null`.
    - `url` - (Optional) The license URL. Defaults to `null`.
  - `terms_of_service_url` - (Optional) The API terms-of-service URL. Defaults to `null`.
  - `policy` - (Optional) API-level policy. Defaults to `null`.
    - `xml_content` - (Optional) The inline XML policy content. Defaults to `null`.
    - `xml_link` - (Optional) A URL to the XML policy content. Defaults to `null`.
  - `operations` - (Optional) A map of API operations. Defaults to `{}`. Each object:
    - `display_name` - (Required) The operation display name.
    - `method` - (Required) The HTTP method.
    - `url_template` - (Required) The operation URL template.
    - `description` - (Optional) The operation description. Defaults to `null`.
    - `template_parameters` - (Optional) A list of URL template **parameter objects** (see below). Defaults to `null`.
    - `request` - (Optional) Request configuration. Defaults to `null`.
      - `description` - (Optional) The request description. Defaults to `null`.
      - `query_parameters` - (Optional) A list of query **parameter objects** (see below). Defaults to `null`.
      - `headers` - (Optional) A list of header **parameter objects** (see below). Defaults to `null`.
      - `representations` - (Optional) A list of request **representation objects** (see below). Defaults to `null`.
    - `responses` - (Optional) A list of responses. Defaults to `null`. Each object:
      - `status_code` - (Required) The HTTP status code.
      - `description` - (Optional) The response description. Defaults to `null`.
      - `headers` - (Optional) A list of header **parameter objects** (see below). Defaults to `null`.
      - `representations` - (Optional) A list of response **representation objects** (see below). Defaults to `null`.
    - `policy` - (Optional) Operation-level policy. Defaults to `null`.
      - `xml_content` - (Optional) The inline XML policy content. Defaults to `null`.
      - `xml_link` - (Optional) A URL to the XML policy content. Defaults to `null`.

  Shared nested shapes used by `apis`:
  - **parameter object** (used by `operations.<op>.template_parameters`, `request.query_parameters`, `request.headers`, and each representation's `form_parameters`):
    - `name` - (Required) The parameter name.
    - `required` - (Required) Whether the parameter is required.
    - `type` - (Required) The parameter type.
    - `description` - (Optional) The parameter description. Defaults to `null`.
    - `default_value` - (Optional) The default value. Defaults to `null`.
    - `values` - (Optional) A list of allowed values. Defaults to `null`.
  - **representation object** (used by `request.representations` and each response's `representations`):
    - `content_type` - (Required) The representation content type.
    - `schema_id` - (Optional) The schema ID. Defaults to `null`.
    - `type_name` - (Optional) The type name within the schema. Defaults to `null`.
    - `form_parameters` - (Optional) A list of **parameter objects** for form content types. Defaults to `null`.

> **Pattern note:** If `location` is not specified, defaults to `var.location`. Tags in `tags` are merged with `var.tags`. `user_assigned_keys` are resolved against `var.managed_identities` and merged with `user_assigned_resource_ids` before being passed to the AVM module.

Type:

```hcl
map(object({
    name                = string
    resource_group_key  = optional(string)
    resource_group_name = optional(string)
    location            = optional(string)
    tags                = optional(map(string), {})

    # Publisher / SKU
    publisher_email = string
    publisher_name  = optional(string, "Apim Example Publisher")
    sku_name        = optional(string, "Developer_1")

    # Control-plane / networking
    min_api_version                         = optional(string)
    notification_sender_email               = optional(string)
    virtual_network_type                    = optional(string, "None")
    virtual_network_subnet_id               = optional(string)
    virtual_network_vnet_key                = optional(string)
    virtual_network_subnet_key              = optional(string)
    public_ip_address_id                    = optional(string)
    public_ip_address_key                   = optional(string)
    public_network_access_enabled           = optional(bool, true)
    gateway_disabled                        = optional(bool, false)
    client_certificate_enabled              = optional(bool, false)
    zones                                   = optional(list(string))
    private_endpoints_manage_dns_zone_group = optional(bool, true)

    # Managed identity (repo convention adds user_assigned_keys cross-reference)
    managed_identities = optional(object({
      system_assigned            = optional(bool, false)
      user_assigned_resource_ids = optional(set(string), [])
      user_assigned_keys         = optional(set(string), [])
    }), {})

    # Protocol settings
    protocols = optional(object({
      enable_http2 = optional(bool, false)
    }))

    # Security settings
    security = optional(object({
      enable_backend_ssl30                                = optional(bool, false)
      enable_backend_tls10                                = optional(bool, false)
      enable_backend_tls11                                = optional(bool, false)
      enable_backend_tls13                                = optional(bool)
      enable_frontend_ssl30                               = optional(bool, false)
      enable_frontend_tls10                               = optional(bool, false)
      enable_frontend_tls11                               = optional(bool, false)
      enable_frontend_tls13                               = optional(bool)
      tls_ecdhe_ecdsa_with_aes128_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled = optional(bool, false)
      tls_ecdhe_ecdsa_with_aes256_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled = optional(bool, false)
      tls_ecdhe_rsa_with_aes128_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled   = optional(bool, false)
      tls_ecdhe_rsa_with_aes256_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled   = optional(bool, false)
      tls_rsa_with_aes128_cbc_sha256_ciphers_enabled      = optional(bool, false)
      tls_rsa_with_aes128_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled         = optional(bool, false)
      tls_rsa_with_aes128_gcm_sha256_ciphers_enabled      = optional(bool, false)
      tls_rsa_with_aes256_gcm_sha384_ciphers_enabled      = optional(bool, false)
      tls_rsa_with_aes256_cbc_sha256_ciphers_enabled      = optional(bool, false)
      tls_rsa_with_aes256_cbc_sha_ciphers_enabled         = optional(bool, false)
      triple_des_ciphers_enabled                          = optional(bool, false)
    }))

    # Service-level (global) policy
    policy = optional(object({
      xml_content = string
    }))

    # Sign-in / sign-up / delegation / tenant access portal settings
    sign_in = optional(object({
      enabled = bool
    }))
    sign_up = optional(object({
      enabled = bool
      terms_of_service = object({
        consent_required = bool
        enabled          = bool
        text             = optional(string, null)
      })
    }))
    delegation = optional(object({
      subscriptions_enabled     = optional(bool, false)
      user_registration_enabled = optional(bool, false)
      url                       = optional(string, null)
      validation_key            = optional(string, null)
    }))
    tenant_access = optional(object({
      enabled = bool
    }))

    # Resource lock
    lock = optional(object({
      kind = string
      name = optional(string, null)
    }))

    # Additional datacenter locations
    additional_location = optional(list(object({
      location              = string
      capacity              = optional(number, null)
      zones                 = optional(list(string), null)
      public_ip_address_id  = optional(string, null)
      public_ip_address_key = optional(string)
      gateway_disabled      = optional(bool, null)
      virtual_network_configuration = optional(object({
        subnet_id  = optional(string)
        vnet_key   = optional(string)
        subnet_key = optional(string)
      }), null)
    })), [])

    # Certificates
    certificate = optional(list(object({
      encoded_certificate  = string
      store_name           = string
      certificate_password = optional(string, null)
    })), [])

    # Hostname configuration
    hostname_configuration = optional(object({
      management = optional(list(object({
        host_name                       = string
        key_vault_id                    = optional(string, null)
        certificate                     = optional(string, null)
        certificate_password            = optional(string, null)
        negotiate_client_certificate    = optional(bool, false)
        ssl_keyvault_identity_client_id = optional(string, null)
      })), [])
      portal = optional(list(object({
        host_name                       = string
        key_vault_id                    = optional(string, null)
        certificate                     = optional(string, null)
        certificate_password            = optional(string, null)
        negotiate_client_certificate    = optional(bool, false)
        ssl_keyvault_identity_client_id = optional(string, null)
      })), [])
      developer_portal = optional(list(object({
        host_name                       = string
        key_vault_id                    = optional(string, null)
        certificate                     = optional(string, null)
        certificate_password            = optional(string, null)
        negotiate_client_certificate    = optional(bool, false)
        ssl_keyvault_identity_client_id = optional(string, null)
      })), [])
      proxy = optional(list(object({
        host_name                       = string
        default_ssl_binding             = optional(bool, false)
        key_vault_id                    = optional(string, null)
        certificate                     = optional(string, null)
        certificate_password            = optional(string, null)
        negotiate_client_certificate    = optional(bool, false)
        ssl_keyvault_identity_client_id = optional(string, null)
      })), [])
      scm = optional(list(object({
        host_name                       = string
        key_vault_id                    = optional(string, null)
        certificate                     = optional(string, null)
        certificate_password            = optional(string, null)
        negotiate_client_certificate    = optional(bool, false)
        ssl_keyvault_identity_client_id = optional(string, null)
      })), [])
    }))

    # Role assignments (repo convention adds managed_identity_key / assign_to_caller cross-references)
    role_assignments = optional(map(object({
      role_definition_id_or_name             = string
      principal_id                           = optional(string)
      managed_identity_key                   = optional(string)
      assign_to_caller                       = optional(bool, false)
      description                            = optional(string, null)
      skip_service_principal_aad_check       = optional(bool, false)
      condition                              = optional(string, null)
      condition_version                      = optional(string, null)
      delegated_managed_identity_resource_id = optional(string, null)
      principal_type                         = optional(string, null)
    })), {})

    # Diagnostic settings (repo convention adds workspace_key / use_default_log_analytics cross-references)
    diagnostic_settings = optional(map(object({
      name                                     = optional(string, null)
      log_categories                           = optional(set(string), [])
      log_groups                               = optional(set(string), ["allLogs"])
      metric_categories                        = optional(set(string), ["AllMetrics"])
      log_analytics_destination_type           = optional(string, "Dedicated")
      workspace_resource_id                    = optional(string, null)
      workspace_key                            = optional(string)
      use_default_log_analytics                = optional(bool, false)
      storage_account_resource_id              = optional(string, null)
      event_hub_authorization_rule_resource_id = optional(string, null)
      event_hub_name                           = optional(string, null)
      marketplace_partner_resource_id          = optional(string, null)
    })), {})

    # Private endpoints
    private_endpoints = optional(map(object({
      name = optional(string, null)
      role_assignments = optional(map(object({
        role_definition_id_or_name             = string
        principal_id                           = string
        description                            = optional(string, null)
        skip_service_principal_aad_check       = optional(bool, false)
        condition                              = optional(string, null)
        condition_version                      = optional(string, null)
        delegated_managed_identity_resource_id = optional(string, null)
        principal_type                         = optional(string, null)
      })), {})
      lock = optional(object({
        kind = string
        name = optional(string, null)
      }), null)
      tags                        = optional(map(string), null)
      subnet_resource_id          = optional(string)
      vnet_key                    = optional(string)
      subnet_key                  = optional(string)
      private_dns_zone_group_name = optional(string, "default")
      private_dns_zone = optional(object({
        resource_ids = optional(set(string), [])
        keys         = optional(set(string), [])
      }), {})
      private_dns_zone_resource_ids           = optional(set(string), [])
      application_security_group_associations = optional(map(string), {})
      private_service_connection_name         = optional(string, null)
      network_interface_name                  = optional(string, null)
      location                                = optional(string, null)
      resource_group_name                     = optional(string, null)
      ip_configurations = optional(map(object({
        name               = string
        private_ip_address = string
      })), {})
    })), {})

    # Subscriptions
    subscriptions = optional(map(object({
      display_name     = string
      scope_type       = string
      scope_identifier = optional(string)
      user_id          = optional(string)
      primary_key      = optional(string)
      secondary_key    = optional(string)
      state            = optional(string, "active")
      allow_tracing    = optional(bool, false)
    })), {})

    # Named values
    named_values = optional(map(object({
      display_name = string
      value        = optional(string)
      secret       = optional(bool, false)
      tags         = optional(list(string), [])
      value_from_key_vault = optional(object({
        secret_id          = string
        identity_client_id = optional(string)
      }))
    })), {})

    # Products
    products = optional(map(object({
      display_name          = string
      description           = optional(string)
      terms                 = optional(string)
      subscription_required = optional(bool, false)
      approval_required     = optional(bool, false)
      subscriptions_limit   = optional(number)
      state                 = optional(string, "published")
      api_names             = optional(list(string), [])
      group_names           = optional(list(string), [])
    })), {})

    # API version sets
    api_version_sets = optional(map(object({
      display_name        = string
      versioning_scheme   = string
      description         = optional(string)
      version_header_name = optional(string)
      version_query_name  = optional(string)
    })), {})

    # Backends
    backends = optional(map(object({
      protocol    = string
      url         = string
      description = optional(string)
      resource_id = optional(string)
      title       = optional(string)

      credentials = optional(object({
        authorization = optional(object({
          parameter = optional(string)
          scheme    = optional(string)
        }))
        certificate = optional(list(string), [])
        header      = optional(map(string), {})
        query       = optional(map(string), {})
      }))

      proxy = optional(object({
        url      = string
        username = string
        password = optional(string)
      }))

      service_fabric_cluster = optional(object({
        client_certificate_thumbprint    = optional(string)
        client_certificate_id            = optional(string)
        management_endpoints             = list(string)
        max_partition_resolution_retries = number
        server_certificate_thumbprints   = optional(list(string), [])
        server_x509_name = optional(list(object({
          issuer_certificate_thumbprint = string
          name                          = string
        })), [])
      }))

      tls = optional(object({
        validate_certificate_chain = optional(bool)
        validate_certificate_name  = optional(bool)
      }))
    })), {})

    # APIs
    apis = optional(map(object({
      display_name          = string
      path                  = string
      protocols             = optional(list(string), ["https"])
      revision              = optional(string, "1")
      service_url           = optional(string)
      description           = optional(string)
      subscription_required = optional(bool, true)

      api_version          = optional(string)
      api_version_set_name = optional(string)
      revision_description = optional(string)

      import = optional(object({
        content_format = string
        content_value  = string
        wsdl_selector = optional(object({
          service_name  = string
          endpoint_name = string
        }))
      }))

      source_api_id = optional(string)

      oauth2_authorization = optional(object({
        authorization_server_name = string
        scope                     = optional(string)
      }))

      openid_authentication = optional(object({
        openid_provider_name         = string
        bearer_token_sending_methods = optional(list(string))
      }))

      subscription_key_parameter_names = optional(object({
        header = string
        query  = string
      }))

      contact = optional(object({
        email = optional(string)
        name  = optional(string)
        url   = optional(string)
      }))

      license = optional(object({
        name = optional(string)
        url  = optional(string)
      }))

      terms_of_service_url = optional(string)

      policy = optional(object({
        xml_content = optional(string)
        xml_link    = optional(string)
      }))

      operations = optional(map(object({
        display_name = string
        method       = string
        url_template = string
        description  = optional(string)

        template_parameters = optional(list(object({
          name          = string
          required      = bool
          type          = string
          description   = optional(string)
          default_value = optional(string)
          values        = optional(list(string))
        })))

        request = optional(object({
          description = optional(string)

          query_parameters = optional(list(object({
            name          = string
            required      = bool
            type          = string
            description   = optional(string)
            default_value = optional(string)
            values        = optional(list(string))
          })))

          headers = optional(list(object({
            name          = string
            required      = bool
            type          = string
            description   = optional(string)
            default_value = optional(string)
            values        = optional(list(string))
          })))

          representations = optional(list(object({
            content_type = string
            schema_id    = optional(string)
            type_name    = optional(string)

            form_parameters = optional(list(object({
              name          = string
              required      = bool
              type          = string
              description   = optional(string)
              default_value = optional(string)
              values        = optional(list(string))
            })))
          })))
        }))

        responses = optional(list(object({
          status_code = number
          description = optional(string)

          headers = optional(list(object({
            name          = string
            required      = bool
            type          = string
            description   = optional(string)
            default_value = optional(string)
            values        = optional(list(string))
          })))

          representations = optional(list(object({
            content_type = string
            schema_id    = optional(string)
            type_name    = optional(string)

            form_parameters = optional(list(object({
              name          = string
              required      = bool
              type          = string
              description   = optional(string)
              default_value = optional(string)
              values        = optional(list(string))
            })))
          })))
        })))

        policy = optional(object({
          xml_content = optional(string)
          xml_link    = optional(string)
        }))
      })), {})
    })), {})
  }))
```

Default: `{}`

### <a name="input_enable_telemetry"></a> [enable\_telemetry](#input\_enable\_telemetry)

Description: Controls whether telemetry is enabled for the wrapped AVM module. See https://aka.ms/avm/telemetryinfo.

Type: `bool`

Default: `true`

### <a name="input_log_analytics_workspaces"></a> [log\_analytics\_workspaces](#input\_log\_analytics\_workspaces)

Description: Log Analytics workspaces output map from the spoke module. Used to resolve diagnostic\_settings.workspace\_key / use\_default\_log\_analytics to a workspace resource ID.

Type: `any`

Default: `{}`

### <a name="input_managed_identities"></a> [managed\_identities](#input\_managed\_identities)

Description: Managed identities output map from spoke module. Used to resolve user\_assigned\_keys to UAMI resource IDs and role\_assignments.managed\_identity\_key to principal IDs.

Type: `any`

Default: `{}`

### <a name="input_private_dns_zones"></a> [private\_dns\_zones](#input\_private\_dns\_zones)

Description: Private DNS zones (combined) output map from the spoke module. Used to resolve private\_endpoints.<pe>.private\_dns\_zone.keys to zone resource IDs.

Type: `any`

Default: `{}`

### <a name="input_public_ips"></a> [public\_ips](#input\_public\_ips)

Description: Public IPs output map from the public\_ip module. Used to resolve public\_ip\_address\_key (and additional\_location public\_ip\_address\_key) to a public IP resource ID.

Type: `any`

Default: `{}`

### <a name="input_resource_groups"></a> [resource\_groups](#input\_resource\_groups)

Description: Resource groups output map from spoke module. Used to resolve resource\_group\_key to name.

Type: `any`

Default: `{}`

### <a name="input_tags"></a> [tags](#input\_tags)

Description: Default tags to merge with per-resource tags.

Type: `map(string)`

Default: `{}`

### <a name="input_virtual_networks"></a> [virtual\_networks](#input\_virtual\_networks)

Description: Virtual networks output map from spoke module. Used to resolve vnet\_key/subnet\_key (VNet injection and private endpoints) to subnet resource IDs.

Type: `any`

Default: `{}`

## Outputs

The following outputs are exported:

### <a name="output_api_management_services"></a> [api\_management\_services](#output\_api\_management\_services)

Description: Map of API Management service keys to their AVM module objects. Each object includes resource\_id, name, the raw resource, identity, gateway/portal URLs, and the nested apis, backends, products, subscriptions, named\_values, private\_endpoints, and other module outputs.

## Modules

The following Modules are called:

### <a name="module_api_management_service"></a> [api\_management\_service](#module\_api\_management\_service)

Source: Azure/avm-res-apimanagement-service/azurerm

Version: 0.9.0

## Cross-Module References

This module's output (`api_management_services`) can be consumed by other modules in this repository.
<!-- END_TF_DOCS -->
